name: Cucumber in Sour Cream Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 each Med cucumber, thinly sliced, 3 cups
1 teaspoon Dill seed or fresh chopped dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the cucumber with salt.
2. Let stand for 30 minutes.
3. Drain thoroughly.
4. Dry on a paper towel.
5. Combine sour cream, vinegar, Tabasco sauce, chives, dill (seed or fresh), and pepper in a bowl.
6. Pour over the cucumber slices.
7. Chill well before serving.
8. Garnish with fresh dill.
